summary: Iteration 203: Unified Material Batches Collection - All backend tests passed (17/17). Frontend UI verified: TracciabilitaMaterialiSection shows 3 rows with colata from material_batches, ControlloFinaleSection shows all 11 checks in 3 areas with correct auto-check values, InstrumentsPage shows Soglia badge on calibro instruments.

issues: Console warning: Encountered two children with the same key (inst_c5ea355990, inst_85dfa1a092) - duplicate instrument IDs in database (known issue from iteration 202)

critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/fpc/batches/rintracciabilita/{commessa_id} correctly reads from unified material_batches collection - returns 3 lotti with colata values (A24-88731, B24-92145, F24-00287)
GET /api/riesame/{commessa_id} materiali_confermati check shows '3 lotti (ACCIAIO, BULLONERIA)' from material_batches
GET /api/riesame/{commessa_id} strumenti_tarati shows '4 strumenti, 0 scaduti' reading instruments with user_id
GET /api/riesame/{commessa_id} attrezzature_idonee shows '4 registrati' reading instruments correctly
GET /api/riesame/{commessa_id} tolleranza_calibro shows 'Conforme' using per-instrument configurable soglia_accettabilita
GET /api/controllo-finale/{commessa_id} returns 11 checks in 3 areas (Visual Testing: 4, Dimensionale: 3, Compliance: 4)
GET /api/controllo-finale/{commessa_id} comp_colate_coerenti shows '3 lotti, 0 senza colata' from material_batches
GET /api/controllo-finale/{commessa_id} dim_strumenti_tarati shows '2 strumenti misura, 0 scaduti'
GET /api/controllo-finale/{commessa_id} vt_saldature_registro shows '0 giunti' from registro_saldatura
GET /api/registro-saldatura/{commessa_id}/saldatori-idonei?processo=135 returns 3 welders qualified for process 135
POST /api/fpc/batches/link-ddt/{commessa_id} works correctly to link DDTs to material_batches
Frontend TracciabilitaMaterialiSection shows 3 rows with colata column displaying heat numbers
Frontend ControlloFinaleSection shows 3 area progress bars (Visual Testing 2/4, Dimensionale 1/3, Compliance 1/4)
Frontend InstrumentsPage shows 'Soglia: ±0.1 mm' badge on Calibro Digitale cards (type=misura only)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI elements working, data correctly displayed)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test commessa with 3 material_batches (bat_loiano_0/1/2), 4 instruments, and 3 welders.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 203 verified the UNIFICATION of data collections - material_batches is now the single source of truth. Key findings: (1) Rintracciabilita endpoint at /api/fpc/batches/rintracciabilita/{commessa_id} returns batches from material_batches with colata field. (2) Riesame Tecnico auto-checks read from material_batches for materiali_confermati. (3) Controllo Finale auto-checks (comp_colate_coerenti, dim_strumenti_tarati, vt_saldature_registro) work correctly. (4) Saldatori-idonei endpoint filters by process qualification. (5) Link-DDT endpoint updates material_batches collection. (6) Frontend TracciabilitaMaterialiSection at data-testid='tracciabilita-materiali-section' shows 3 rows with colata. (7) Frontend ControlloFinaleSection at data-testid='controllo-finale-section' shows 11 checks in 3 areas. (8) InstrumentsPage shows Soglia badge on calibro instruments. (9) IMPORTANT: API calls must NOT use trailing slash to avoid 307 redirect issues.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/fpc/batches/rintracciabilita/{c: PASS - Returns 3 batches with colata from material_batches
backend_endpoints.GET /api/riesame/{commessa_id}: PASS - materiali_confermati shows 3 lotti, tolleranza_calibro uses soglia_accettabilita
backend_endpoints.GET /api/controllo-finale/{commessa_id}: PASS - Returns 11 checks in 3 areas with correct auto-check values
backend_endpoints.GET /api/registro-saldatura/{commessa_id: PASS - Returns 3 welders qualified for process 135
backend_endpoints.GET /api/fascicolo-tecnico/{commessa_id}: PASS - Returns DOP list with auto-populated fields
backend_endpoints.GET /api/instruments: PASS - Returns instruments with soglia_accettabilita field
